# Efficiency

- Read minimum files required.
- Prefer current file.
- Do not search workspace unless explicitly requested.
- Ask before reading more than 5 files.
- Ask before multi-file edits.
- Reuse existing code.
- No architecture analysis.
- No refactoring unless requested.
- Keep plans under 5 steps.

When you discover stable architectural knowledge:
- update docs/agent-memory.md
- keep entries concise
- deduplicate existing information
- new info keep it just in few lines
- do not exceed 150 lines in file agent-memory.md
